case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. NAOMI SANDERS et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-12-2007 CONTINUED TO JAN-11-2008 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
